snippet.title: Swayambhu - Epic Teaser (Telugu) | Nikhil Siddhartha | Samyukta | Nabha | Bharat | Ravi Basrur
snippet.description:
Swayambhu is an Upcoming PAN India Movie Starring Nikhil Siddhartha, Samyuktha, Nabha Natesh, Sunil, Subbaraju, Satya, & Others. Written and Directed by Bharat Krishnamachari. Music Composed by Ravi Basrur. Cinematography by KK Senthil Kumar. Produced by Bhuvan and Sreekar & Presented by Tagore Madhu under the Pixel Studios Banner.

BLASTING IN THEATRES THIS SUMMER 2026🤩

#SwayambhuEpicTeaser #Swayambhu #NikhilSiddhartha #Samyuktha #NabhaNatesh #Sunil #BharatKrishnamachari #TagoreMadhu #RaviBasrur #SenthilKumar #PixelStudios #LatestMovies2026 #UpcomingMovies2026 #NewTeluguMovies #UpcomingTeluguMovies

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | ROUND 3 | Day 3
snippet.description:
Round 3 of BGIS 2026 begins, and the competition reaches a new level of intensity.

Only teams that proved their consistency and adaptability move forward to this stage. With fewer spots and higher pressure, every match demands precision, composure, and smart decision-making. Small margins now carry big consequences. Expect sharper gameplay, calculated risks, and moments that define the path ahead. This is where performances truly matter and momentum can shift in an instant.

Tune in live and follow the journey as BGIS 2026 continues.

snippet.title: Gidha - R Nait (Official Video) | Himanshi Khurana | New Punjabi Bhangra Songs 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready for high-energy beats and pure Punjabi vibes! Presenting the official video of Gidha by R Nait, featuring the stunning Himanshi Khurana. Powered with electrifying Bhangra music by Qaistrax and grand visuals by Sardaar Films, this track is all set to rule weddings, parties & festivals.

If you loved emotional storytelling in Guitar Warga, now experience the powerful Bhangra side of R Nait with dhol beats, vibrant gidha performances and full Punjabi swag!

🎧 Listen on All Audio Platforms:

♪ iTunes: https://tinyurl.com/fw8bxhha 
♪ Spotify: https://tinyurl.com/mps2txvy  
♪ JioSaavn: https://tinyurl.com/2tmv934j 
♪ YouTube Music: https://tinyurl.com/2c6kj265 
♪ Amazon Music: https://tinyurl.com/558yvvm7 
♪Insta Audio:- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/883914604121199/
⸻

🎶 Song Credits:

👉 Song: Gidha
👉 Singer / Lyricist / Composer: R Nait
👉 Featuring: Himanshi Khurana
👉 Music: Qaistrax
👉 Video: Sardaar Films
👉 Director: Jaspreet Singh
👉 Choreographer: Anoop Rai
👉 DOP: Jeet
👉 Edit & DI: Arshpreet
👉 Production: Param Pasula
👉 Project By: Satkaranvir Singh Khosa
👉 Conceived By: Virvinder Singh Kaku
👉 Digital Partner: Coin Digital Pvt. Ltd.

⸻

This song brings traditional Punjabi gidha vibes mixed with modern Bhangra production — perfect for wedding season 2026!

Don’t forget to LIKE, COMMENT & SHARE ❤️
Subscribe for more latest Punjabi songs.

#RNait #Gidha #PunjabiSong #Bhangra #LatestPunjabiSong2026 #HimanshiKhurana #PunjabiMusic #WeddingSong #BhangraBeat

snippet.title: “Spider-Noir” –  True-Hue Full Color Teaser Trailer | Available In Multi - Audio | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
With no power comes no responsibility. "Spider-Noir" - a live-action series starring Nicolas Cage - arrives in True-Hue full color and authentic Black & White May 27 on Prime Video India, available in English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam and Kannada.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#SpiderNoirOnPrime

Joh phirdiyan phaliyaan Kude 
Kale Dil Na Jattan De Putt Rakhde Cara Panwe Kaliyan Kude

Kale Dil Na Jattan De Putt Rakhde Cara Panwe Kaliyan Kude

Bande Nasli Hi Team Vich Jachde
Ni Heeren Jeh Yrr Panwe Billo Thode Khat Ne
Jithe Per Chad Jande Bande Koli Chat Ne
Ni Othe Jake Adiyan pagaiyaan Tere Jatt Ne

Pata Laga Grewal Kende Utte Di Aa Chij Ni
Pind Aviana Sara Kar Dita Seel Ni
Dungi Sat Marda Takake Landa Reej Ni

Oh Lene Godyan Thale Ni Jede Karde Aa Deal Ni
Khar Mana Vich Rende Sap Palde 
Ni main Aakya Bathera Bade Chir To

Hath Jod De Ni Yaariyan Lai Vapsi Hath Chakya Rakne Jina Seer To
Oh Kutte Ponkde Pitha Utte Ponk Lende Ni

Aaina Salyan De Pake Rakhu Jatt Sangli
Leke weapon licensi Nhio Vair Pugde Aa
Asla Chahida Paka 2 Numberi
Leke weapon licensi Nhio Vair Pugde Aa
Asla Chahida Paka

Puri Power Patan De Vich Rakhda Ni Shonki Jatt Kodhi Panda Aa
Khushi Duggan Mare Chak Chak Ni
Lenda Aa Sawad jeonDa

Oh Hukam Te Chalda
Na Hukam Na Senda
Na Koi Fukri Kude

snippet.title: Kadhal Reset Repeat - Official Teaser | Director Vijay | Harris Jayaraj | Madumkesh | Jiya Shankar
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Teaser of Kadhal Reset Repeat, directed by Director Vijay, with music composed by Harris Jayaraj.

Starring Madumkesh, Arjun Ashokan and Jiya Shankar, this romantic entertainer teases a refreshing love story packed with emotions, modern relationships, and soulful music. With Harris Jayaraj’s signature melodies and Director Vijay’s heartfelt storytelling, Kadhal Reset Repeat promises a beautiful cinematic experience for audiences.

KadhalResetRepeat - Official teaser is out now!

In cinemas from March 6th, 2026.

snippet.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Created in collaboration between Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski, the new “Untitled John Wick Game” will feature an original script set in the John Wick timeline, expanding on the franchise’s intricate lore with familiar characters fans already know, as well as completely new ones. Saber’s design will be faithful to the unique style and signature elements of the series, including a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments, all crafted to make players feel like they are in a John Wick movie, playing the role of John Wick himself.

#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #johnwick 

May contain content inappropriate for children. Visit http://www.esrb.org for rating information.

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Karua Tel | Ashish Yadav New Song | Srishti Bharti |Raksha Gupta | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
आशिष यादव का नया धमाकेदार भोजपुरी गाना “करुआ तेल” प्रस्तुत है, जिसमें श्रीष्टी भारती की मधुर आवाज़ और रक्षागुप्ता की शानदार अदाकारी देखने को मिलती है। जबरदस्त म्यूजिक और देसी अंदाज़ से सजा यह गीत पूरी तरह मनोरंजन से भरपूर है। नया भोजपुरी गाना पसंद करने वालों के लिए खास पेशकश।

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Credits:-

Song Name - Karua Tel
Singer - Aashish Yadav & Srishti Bharti
Music - Pappu Bhai
Lyrics - Chintu Raja
Feat - Raksha Gupta
Composer - Nandan Yadav
Recording - Govind Vidyarthi
Video - Aashish Park
DOP - Rajesh Rathore & Vikash
Editor - Parkash
DI - Rohit Singh Mumbai

snippet.title: Psycho Saiyaan Official Teaser | Ravi Kishan, Tejasswi Prakash, Anud Singh Dhaka | Amazon MX Player
snippet.description:
Valentine’s ke paavan avsar par, kya banoge?
Psycho ya Saiyaan? 👀

Sab jald hi expose hoga ☠️
18 Feb ko trailer out!

Amazon MX Player presents
Psycho Saiyaan Official Teaser 

Starring: Ravi Kishan, Tejasswi Prakash, Anud Singh Dhaka, Srishti Shrivastava, Vaarun Bhagat, Ashwini Kalsekar, Surbhi Chandna  
Production House: Parin Multimedia Pvt Ltd, Freedom One LLP
Produced By: Saurabh Tewari, Sumeet Chaudhry, Kewal Sethi, Hitesh Bhatia  
Creative Producer: Saurabh Tewari
Directed By: Ajay Bhuyan 
Genre: Romantic Thriller

About Psycho Saiyaan: Kartik Pandey, a poetic student in Ujjain, becomes obsessed with Charu, convinced she is his destiny. Enter Huntry Chauhan, ruthless gangster-politician, bringing with him a violent world of manipulation where love turns toxic, obsession deepens, and sanity blurs into madness.

About Amazon MX Player -
Amazon MX Player is India’s leading free, premium, ad-supported streaming entertainment platform, offering a massive library of trending web series, reality shows, movies, and international content — all FREE to watch. From youth hits and binge-worthy dramas to reality competition shows, Amazon MX Player is home to some of India’s most popular titles including Hip Hop India, Case Toh Banta Hai, Playground, Battleground, Crushed, Gutar Gu, Rise and Fall, Sisterhood, Campus Beats, First Copy, Pyar Ka Professor, Jamnapaar, I-Popstar, Aukaat Ke Bahar and many more. Love international content? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global shows dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu—including fan-favourites like Our Secret, Gen Z, Time To Fall In Love, W: Two Worlds Apart, My Deskmate, and more! With new shows dropping regularly across genres like romance, action, comedy, crime, thriller, K-drama, youth drama, and reality entertainment — there’s always something exciting to stream.

snippet.title: KATTALAN -MAJAKO MALLIKA (MAL)-Lyrical | Cubes Entertainments | B.Ajaneesh | Pepe | Sunil | Dushara
snippet.description:
Presenting “Majako Mallika” (Malayalam Lyrical Video) from Kattalan, starring Antony Varghese, Dushara Vijayan, Sunil, Kabir Singh etc
Composed by B. Ajaneesh Loknath, this vibrant track blends energetic rhythms with catchy lyrics, bringing the film’s festive vibe to life.

Directed by Paul George and producer by Shareef Muhammed in Cubes Entertainments Banner. Featuring powerful visuals and musical storytelling, Majako Mallika is set to become a chartbuster among music lovers.

snippet.title: Machar ko leke bapuji Hogaye bhide pe ghussa! | FULL MOVIE | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Step into Jethalal’s world with Gada Electronics!  Manage the shop, tackle quirky customers, and experience nonstop TMKOC-style fun. 

Are you ready for the challenge? 
Play now: https://gadaelectronics.page.link/dhgB  
#GadaElectronics #TMKOCGame

Watch the FULL MOVIE of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSk2_rPKNCDcjNAA8vaDN-E&si=rC5AotwLD2r3MHna

Click here to watch NEW Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSxhJ6UCi6tgujD-FsAy0sw

Click here to watch your favourite videos from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Nitish Bhaluni / Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu)
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Sachin Shroff / Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Sunayana Fozdar / Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Jheel Mehta / Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani / Khushi Mali as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu)
Gurucharan Singh / Balwinder Singh Suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal / Monaz Mevawala as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Samay Shah as Gurucharan Singh Roshan Singh Sodhi (Gogi)
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah / Dharmit Turakhia as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Kuldeep Gor as Ratan Binjola
Dharti Bhatt as Rupa Baditop Binjola
Akshaan Sehrawat as Veer
Maahi Bhadra as Bansari
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku
Ghanshyam Nayak / Kiran Bhatt as Nattu Kaka
Tanmay Vekaria as Bagha
Navina Wadekar / Monika Bhadoriya as Bawri
Daya Shankar Pandey as Chalu Pandey
Rakesh Bedi as Taarak's Boss
Mayur Vakani as Sundarlal
Kanti Joshi as Baka

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

saara soda pure haee kuch na farod leri

thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri 
nakhare karod leri….

thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri
nakhare karod leri….

gore gore mukhade pe LV ka chashma 
kaale peele laal Suit pahare saare fasama(2)
Ajay hooda kare ke taareef ra teri
Beauty aale world wide saare tu record leri
40….40….40….40…..40
40 kilo kee tu sari 100 kilo kee marod leri
thaanda thaanda marajaaga nakhare karod leri
nakhare karod leri….

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

localized.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
localized.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: The LAW
snippet.description:
temu avengers

Unstable SMP: The LAW

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere  
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @LettuceK @JadenMAN @minutetechmc @PrinceZam @MapiccMc @jumperwho @PurpledMC @Boosfer @Lomedy @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Run of Things - Lauf der Dinge https://youtu.be/V5mExzEKWs8 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Cycle - Zyklus https://youtu.be/5Xx4rNUey90 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prophet (dialogue) https://youtu.be/nreMC82GPo4 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Phoenix https://youtu.be/cl-poVUU6_I by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): The Lonely Mountain - Der Einsame Berg https://youtu.be/4e1smtwtPSA by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Brave new World - Schöne neue Welt https://youtu.be/QRQ8_vFVQIU by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Black Light - Schwarzes Licht https://youtu.be/h6QIAw0duF0 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

snippet.title: I GOT A SUPER CARS WORTH *$50,000,000* IN SUPER WHEEL SPIN 🤑 Forza Horizon 5 - LOGITECH G29
snippet.description:
REBUILDING an OLD LAMBORGHINI to FASTEST LAMBO EVER! 🔥 - Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29

What happens when you take a forgotten, beat-up Lamborghini and transform it into an absolute speed monster? In this Forza Horizon 5 build, we're doing the IMPOSSIBLE! 🚀

Watch as we take a neglected Lamborghini from the junkyard, completely rebuild it, tune every component, and push it beyond its limits to create what might just be the FASTEST Lamborghini ever built in Forza Horizon 5! All played with the Logitech G29 steering wheel for the ultimate sim racing experience

What happens when you take a forgotten, beat-up Lamborghini and transform it into an absolute speed monster? In this Forza Horizon 5 build, we're doing the IMPOSSIBLE! 🚀

snippet.title: CAN YOU ESCAPE THE ISLAND OF MONSTERS? | Reanimal - Part 1

𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨 𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐮𝐛𝐞 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐥 𝐢𝐧 𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐥, 𝐦𝐚𝐲 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐜𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐜𝐨𝐩𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐧𝐨𝐭 𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐩𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐡𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐞𝐫(𝐬), 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐜𝐡 𝐰𝐞 𝐛𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐯𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐠𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐟𝐚𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐟𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐥 𝐥𝐚𝐰 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐅𝐀𝐈𝐑 𝐔𝐒𝐄 𝐝𝐨𝐜𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐯𝐞.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.description:
ಮಹಾ ಶಿವರಾತ್ರಿ ವಿಶೇಷ ಭಕ್ತಿ ಗೀತೆಗಳು | ಲಿಂಗಾಷ್ಟಕಂ | Maha Shivaratri Special Shiva Bhakti Songs Kannada

Maha Shivaratri Special Shiva Bhakti Songs in Kannada including the powerful Lingashtakam are sacred hymns dedicated to Lord Shiva (Mahadeva).
Listening or chanting these devotional songs on the auspicious night of Maha Shivaratri removes sins, negative karma, and obstacles while bringing peace, protection, and spiritual awakening.

Devotees believe worshipping Lord Shiva on Shivaratri grants wish fulfillment, divine blessings, and immense spiritual merit.
Ideal for Shivaratri night vigil (Jaagaran), pooja, meditation, and deep spiritual practice.
Listen with devotion and receive the grace of Sri Mahadeva.

snippet.title: I am In Love - 8K | Yeh Dil Aashiqana | Karan Nath, Jividha |Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik|Nadeem-Shravan
snippet.description:
Celebrate love this Valentine’s Day with “I Am In Love” from the movie Yeh Dil Aashiqana. ❤️

Beautifully sung by Kumar Sanu and Alka Yagnik, this romantic melody is composed by Nadeem - Shravan with heartfelt lyrics by Sameer.

The song perfectly captures the magic of falling in love, sweet emotions, and timeless romance. A perfect track to dedicate to someone special on Valentine’s Day.

🎶💖 #YehDilAashiqana in cinemas 🎬😍
Experience the love once again on the big screen!
🔁 Re-Released by: True Entertainment Pvt Ltd.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

snippet.title: Gaura ji ko lene aaye Bholenath ji | Saje hai ambar saji hai dharti | Jeetu Sharma | Mahashiv Ratri
snippet.description:
#Mahashivratri2026 #Jeetusharma #Shivratrispecial 

Saje hai ambar saji hai dharti   
 saji puri akash ji
Gaura ji ko lene aye 
 mere bholenath ji  

Ghungat  me chanda si lage meri maiya parvati
Man mohak sa roop hai lage mere bholenath ki
Ghungat  me chanda si lage meri maiya parvati
Man mohak sa roop lage mere bholenath ki
Milan ki mangal ghadi hai ayi shakti shiv ke sath ji 
Gaura ji ko  lene aye mere bholenath ji


Saji hai kashi saji ujjaini
Saji puri kailash ji
Gaura ji ko lene aye mere bholenath ji

Thama  hath maa gaura ka mere bholenath ne

snippet.title: Shiba Ratri Brata Katha | ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କଥା | Namita Agrawal | Jagara Mahima Katha 🙏
snippet.description:
ଓମ୍ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ! 🙏 ସମସ୍ତ ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ହେଉଛି ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ। କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ଶୁଦ୍ଧ ଓ ସୁମଧୁର କଣ୍ଠ ସ୍ୱରରେ ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ 'ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କଥା' ଏବଂ ଏହାର ଅପାର ମହିମା।

ଜାଗର ରାତିରେ ପ୍ରଭୁ ମହାଦେବଙ୍କ ପାଖରେ ଦୀପ ଜାଳି ଏହି ବ୍ରତ କଥା ଶ୍ରବଣ କଲେ କୋଟି ପୁଣ୍ୟ ପ୍ରାପ୍ତି ହୁଏ। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓରେ ଆପଣ ଜାଣିବାକୁ ପାଇବେ:

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କାହିଁକି ପାଳନ କରାଯାଏ?
ବ୍ୟାଧ ଓ ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ପୌରାଣିକ କାହାଣୀ।
ଜାଗର ରାତିର ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱ ଓ ପୂଜା ବିଧି।

Topic: Shiba Ratri Brata Katha (ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କଥା)
Singer: Namita Agrawal
Music Label: Sidharth Music / Sidharth Bhakti
Category: Odia Purana / Devotional Katha

#ShivaRatriBrataKatha #JagaraMahima #NamitaAgrawal #OdiaPurana #MahaShivaratri2026 #JagaraKatha #SidharthMusic #OdiaDevotional #ShivaPurana #JayJagannath #HarHarMahadev

ଜାଗର ରାତିରେ ପ୍ରଭୁ ମହାଦେବଙ୍କ ପାଖରେ ଦୀପ ଜାଳି ଏହି ବ୍ରତ କଥା ଶ୍ରବଣ କଲେ କୋଟି ପୁଣ୍ୟ ପ୍ରାପ୍ତି ହୁଏ। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓରେ ଆପଣ ଜାଣିବାକୁ ପାଇବେ:

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କାହିଁକି ପାଳନ କରାଯାଏ?
ବ୍ୟାଧ ଓ ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ପୌରାଣିକ କାହାଣୀ।
ଜାଗର ରାତିର ଆଧ୍ୟାତ୍ମିକ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱ ଓ ପୂଜା ବିଧି।

Topic: Shiba Ratri Brata Katha (ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତ କଥା)
Singer: Namita Agrawal
Music Label: Sidharth Music / Sidharth Bhakti

snippet.title: శివరాత్రి స్పెషల్: శివుని పాటలు | Shivaratri Special Songs | Shiva Bhakti Songs | Lingashtakam
snippet.description:
శివరాత్రి స్పెషల్: శివుని పాటలు | Shivaratri Special Songs | Shiva Bhakti Songs | Lingashtakam

Celebrate the divine occasion of Maha Shivaratri with these powerful Shiva Bhakti Songs in Telugu. Listening to Lord Shiva devotional songs and chanting “Om Namah Shivaya” helps reduce stress, remove negative energy, and bring peace and positivity into your life.

These sacred bhakti songs invoke the blessings of Mahadev for success, spiritual growth, protection, and inner strength. On this auspicious Shivaratri, dedicate your prayers to Lord Shiva and experience divine vibrations and powerful spiritual energy.

May Lord Shiva bless you and your family with health, happiness, and prosperity. Har Har Mahadev!

snippet.title: Vaan Vaan | Idhayam Murali | Atharvaa | Kayadu Lohar | Thaman S | Mohit Chauhan | Aakash Baskaran
snippet.description:
Presenting the Lyric Video of "Vaan Vaan" from "Idhayam Murali", Sung by Mohit Chauhan, Lyrics Written by Vivek, Music Composed by Thaman S.

Song Credits:

Song Name : Vaan Vaan
Movie : Idhayam Murali
Music Composed, Programmed & Arranged by Thaman S
Singer : Mohit Chauhan
Mexican 🇲🇽 Spanish 🇪🇸 Guitars : Joel Sastry 
Additional Programming : Shashank Alamuru, Osho V, Hari S R
Live Arrangement : The Gongura Band 
Harmony Vocals : Sahithi, Adviteeya, Prakruthi, Pranati, Vagdevi, Sruthika, Vaishnavi, Pratyusha, Rajini & Sruthi 
Vocal Supervision : Adviteeya V & Harsha 
Recorded at V Studios (Chennai) by Osho V & Hari @ Vibe (Hyderabad), Rakshit @ Saraswati Music College (Delhi) 

Mix and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge (Mumbai)
Assistant Engineers : Jazbaat, Sohamm, Suryansh

Musicians Coordinator : Manikandan K
Studio Manager : Seenu & Sridhar
Studio Assistance : Raju, Ranjith, Kannan, Lingam & Pawan

Movie Credits:

Starring:

snippet.title: Playing as Lava Mad Granny in Granny Chapter 1 New Update
snippet.description:
MAIN BANA MAD GRANNY! 😡 Lava Granny ke ghar mein ghus kar uski chhutti kar di!

​Dosto, ab tak aapne mujhe Granny se bachte hue dekha hoga, lekin aaj baazi palat gayi hai! Is video mein Main khud "Mad Granny" ban gaya hoon aur maine bol diya hai Lava Granny ko challenge. 😎
​Poora ghar khaulta hua lava hai, lekin is baar main bhag nahi raha, balki main shikaar kar raha hoon! Mad Granny ki powers aur mera gussa—kya purani Lava Granny mere samne tik payegi? 🌋🔥

​🔥 Video Highlights:

​I am the Monster: Is baar main insaan nahi, khatarnak Mad Granny hoon!

​Lava House Raid: Lava se bhare ghar mein Mad Granny ka aatank.

​Role Reversal: Dekhiye kya hota hai jab Granny ka samna usse bhi zyada "Mad" Granny se hota hai.

​Is video mein kya khaas hai:

​✅ Mad Granny POV Gameplay (Hindi).

​✅ Lava Floor ke beech khatarnak fight aur action.

​✅ Granny vs Mad Granny ka maha-yuddh!

​Agar aapko mera ye Mad Granny wala avatar pasand aaya, toh Like zaroor karein! Comment mein batayein ki kya mujhe hamesha ke liye Granny ban jana chahiye? 😂 Aur channel ko Subscribe karna mat bhoolna! 🔔

​#MadGranny #LavaGranny #GrannyPOV #I AmGranny #GrannyMod #HindiGaming #LavaFloorChallenge #GrannyChapter1

Video mein kya khaas hai:
​New Lava Floor Challenge 🌋
​Hidden Secrets of the New Update
​Epic Escape Mission in Hindi
​Agar aapko video pasand aaye toh Like zaroor karein aur channel ko Subscribe karna na bhoolein!

snippet.title: Maha Siba Ratri Mahima | ମହା ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ମହିମା | ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ଜାଗର ରାତି | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ଓମ୍ ନମଃ ଶିବାୟ! 🙏 ସମସ୍ତ ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ହେଉଛି ଜାଗର ବ୍ରତ ବା ମହାଶିବରାତ୍ରି। ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ରାତିର ମହିମା ଅପାର। କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲ୍ ଙ୍କ ଭକ୍ତିଭରା ସ୍ୱରରେ ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଭୁ ମହାଦେବଙ୍କ ମହିମା ଏବଂ ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ।

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି କେବଳ ଏକ ପର୍ବ ନୁହେଁ, ଏହା ହେଉଛି ଆତ୍ମଶୁଦ୍ଧି ଓ ଶିବଙ୍କ ସହ ମିଳନର ଏକ ପବିତ୍ର ତିଥି। ଏହି ଭିଡିଓ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଆପଣ ଜାଣିବାକୁ ପାଇବେ:

ଶିବରାତ୍ରି ବ୍ରତର ପୌରାଣିକ ମହତ୍ୱ।
କାହିଁକି ଏହି ରାତିକୁ 'ବ୍ରତ ମଧ୍ୟେ ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ' କୁହାଯାଏ?
ଜାଗର ଦୀପ ଜାଳିବାର ମହିମା।

#MahaShivaRatri #JagarMahima #NamitaAgrawal #OdiaPurana #MahaSibaRatri2026 #Jagaran #Mahadev #OmNamahShivaya #SidharthMusic #OdiaDevotional #ShivaRatriStory

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

आज की लाइव स्ट्रीम में Charles Monster के साथ होने वाला है सबसे बड़ा लाइव मुकाबला! 🔥

Kya aaj hum uski Nightmare Mode Wali Train ko haraa paayenge, ya woh humein dhoond kar khaa jaayega? 😱

Charles ka ghar dhoondna hai, use harana hai, aur iss challenge ko poora karna hai.

Live chat mein aa kar challenge do, sawal poocho, aur main aapke naam zaroor loonga! Aao milkar darte hain! 💀

#MahaShivaratri2026 #ShivaratriSpecial #Lingashtakam #ShivaSongsKannada #OmNamahShivaya #ShivaBhakti #KannadaDevotional 

Maha Shivaratri 2026 Special – Listen to the most powerful Shivaratri Kannada Devotional Songs, including the sacred Lingashtakam, Shiva Bhajans, and divine mantra chanting. 
This special collection of Shiva Kannada Bhakti Songs is dedicated to Lord Shiva for spiritual awakening, peace, and blessings on the auspicious night of Maha Shivaratri.

Celebrate Maha Shivaratri 2026 with devotion and receive the divine blessings of Lord Shiva.

🔱 Om Namah Shivaya 🔱

#MahaShivaratri2026 #ShivaratriSpecial #Lingashtakam #ShivaSongsKannada #OmNamahShivaya #ShivaBhakti #KannadaDevotional 

Maha Shivaratri 2026 Special – Listen to the most powerful Shivaratri Kannada Devotional Songs, including the sacred Lingashtakam, Shiva Bhajans, and divine mantra chanting. 
This special collection of Shiva Kannada Bhakti Songs is dedicated to Lord Shiva for spiritual awakening, peace, and blessings on the auspicious night of Maha Shivaratri.

Celebrate Maha Shivaratri 2026 with devotion and receive the divine blessings of Lord Shiva.

🔱 Om Namah Shivaya 🔱

snippet.title: शिव विवाह-चले गौरा बिहाने | Lakhbir Singh Lakha | Mahashivratri Special Shiv Bhajan | Shivratri Song
snippet.description:
शिव विवाह-चले गौरा बिहाने | Lakhbir Singh Lakha | Mahashivratri Special Shiv Bhajan | Shivratri Song
देवाधिदेव महादेव भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती जी के विवाह की अदभुद लीला का आनंद ले . आप सभी भक्त लखबीर सिंह लक्खा जी की आवाज़ और चंद्रा - सूर्या के संगीत एवं 
चंद्रा प्रकाश के द्वारा लिखे इस  भक्ति से सराबोर शिव भजन को सुन कर आनंदित हों. भोलेनाथ की कृपा आप सभी पर बनी रहे 🙏हर हर महादेव 🙏

🎶 Listen to "Chale Gaura Bihane Bhandari" on:
➟ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/5o6C7kgSHKAd8nYA1inCrn?si=0fb36f2537fe4fe4
➟ YouTube Music - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6-B0fUBxIfU&list=RD6-B0fUBxIfU&start_radio=1
➟ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/chale-gaura-bihane-bhandari-single/1822929909
➟ Jio Saavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/chale-gaura-bihane-bhandari/AyRdQEdeVFU
➟ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/chale-gaura-bihane-bhandari
➟ Amazon - https://music.amazon.in/tracks/B0FFMRMSWZ?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&ref=dm_sh_qsIK53syanl6Nq4nzMAFUlQyZ

🎬 Create your version of "Chale Gaura Bihane Bhandari": on

                    https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/755276080394927?igsh=bzR3ZnExZXRpYmVm
➟ YouTube Shorts:  https://youtube.com/source/6-B0fUBxIfU/shorts?feature=shared
                    https://youtube.com/source/Xtn_W6-2yb0/shorts?feature=shared

➟ Facebook Post : 

 #affectionmusicrecords #lakhbirsinghlakha #shivbhajans #shivvivah

🎧 Credits:

➟ Title : Chale Gaura Bihane Bhandari (Shiv Vivah)
➟ Singer : Lakhbir Singh "Lakha" 
➟ Music : Chandra-Surya
➟ Lyrics : Chandra Prakash

➟ Mix And Master : Surya Prakash

➟ Harmonium & Banjo : Pradeep Pandit

🎬 Credits:

➟ Feat. : Lakhbir Singh "Lakha"
          Sharad Rastogi - (Shiv Ji)(ilu Mastana),khusi Saini (Guara ji),Kamni Singh (Maina Ji),Nandini, Priyanshi, Charlie (Gaura ji Ki Shaki), Manu (Brahama),Sannu (Vishnu)
          Aghori : Omkar, Pranjal, Nitin, Sunny, Himanshu, Ranu, Anurag, Roshan, Sona,Shubham, Shikhar, Rajinder, Nitin singh, 
          Pandit Ji : Dheerendra & Seetaram
➟Manager : Kashish Rastogi, Abhay Shukla
➟Choreographer : Reyansh Suryavanshi
➟ DOP And Cinematographer : Prashant Kumar Gupta 
➟ 2nd Unit Dop : Bhanu
➟ Cameraman Assistent : Sunny Paswan , Sandeep

➟ Makeup Assistants : Vishal

➟ Lights : Paras Light

➟ Edit & DI : Prince Sethi
➟ Catering : Mahesh Gupta

➟ Location : Sundaram Resort
➟ Record Label: Affection Music Records India Pvt.Ltd. 

☛All © Reserved to Affection Music Records 

“शिव विवाह” 
========
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
करके नंदीसवारी देखो लागे भोले की छवि न्यारीहै 
मेरे भोले की बारात में सब मिले 
ब्रह्म विष्णु सहित सुर असुर भी चले 
नाचे ठुमक ठुमक गिरधारी चढ़ी क्या खुमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                    ****
जरा धीरे चलो मोरे बाराती भइया -२
थोड़ा सा नाचें सभी ता ता थैया 
धरती गगन सारी श्रृष्टि है झूमें 
होके मगन नाग किन्नर भी घूमें 
जरा भोले के चेहरे को देखो लालिमा छाई है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                ****
द्वारे पे पहुंचे जो बारात लेके 
सारे जनाती आँखें फाड़ के देखें 
कईसन है दूल्हा मिला तुमको गौरा 
तन पे ना कपड़ा कोई ढंग का पहिरा 
वहाँ कईसे रहेगी महारानी चिंता ये हमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
             ****
सखियाँ कहें कईसे रस्में निभाऊँ 
जूता ना पईरन मा अब का चुराऊँ 
सारी उम्मीदो पे पानी है फेरा 
अब कईसे लुंगी वो था हक जो मेरा 
ख़ुश रहो सदा मेरी प्यारी दुआ ये हमारी है
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
           ****
बाबुल की लेके चली है दुआयें 
माता मैना रो रो लेती बालाएं 
करके बिदाई चले भोले शंकर 
खुशियां ही खुशियां हैं मन में वो भरकर 
तीनो लोकों ने गायी बधाई खिली फुलवारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं

hi.description:
शिव विवाह-चले गौरा बिहाने | Lakhbir Singh Lakha | Mahashivratri Special Shiv Bhajan | Shivratri Song
देवाधिदेव महादेव भगवान शिव और माता पार्वती जी के विवाह की अदभुद लीला का आनंद ले . आप सभी भक्त लखबीर सिंह लक्खा जी की आवाज़ और चंद्रा - सूर्या के संगीत एवं 
चंद्रा प्रकाश के द्वारा लिखे इस  भक्ति से सराबोर शिव भजन को सुन कर आनंदित हों. भोलेनाथ की कृपा आप सभी पर बनी रहे 🙏हर हर महादेव 🙏

“शिव विवाह” 
========
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
करके नंदीसवारी देखो लागे भोले की छवि न्यारीहै 
मेरे भोले की बारात में सब मिले 
ब्रह्म विष्णु सहित सुर असुर भी चले 
नाचे ठुमक ठुमक गिरधारी चढ़ी क्या खुमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                    ****
जरा धीरे चलो मोरे बाराती भइया -२
थोड़ा सा नाचें सभी ता ता थैया 
धरती गगन सारी श्रृष्टि है झूमें 
होके मगन नाग किन्नर भी घूमें 
जरा भोले के चेहरे को देखो लालिमा छाई है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
                ****
द्वारे पे पहुंचे जो बारात लेके 
सारे जनाती आँखें फाड़ के देखें 
कईसन है दूल्हा मिला तुमको गौरा 
तन पे ना कपड़ा कोई ढंग का पहिरा 
वहाँ कईसे रहेगी महारानी चिंता ये हमारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
             ****
सखियाँ कहें कईसे रस्में निभाऊँ 
जूता ना पईरन मा अब का चुराऊँ 
सारी उम्मीदो पे पानी है फेरा 
अब कईसे लुंगी वो था हक जो मेरा 
ख़ुश रहो सदा मेरी प्यारी दुआ ये हमारी है
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं 
           ****
बाबुल की लेके चली है दुआयें 
माता मैना रो रो लेती बालाएं 
करके बिदाई चले भोले शंकर 
खुशियां ही खुशियां हैं मन में वो भरकर 
तीनो लोकों ने गायी बधाई खिली फुलवारी है 
चले गौरा बिहाने भंडारी देव बलिहारी हैं
